metadata.title: PLANESCO – Industrial Construction Consulting | Project Management & Planning
metadata.description: PLANESCO delivers industrial construction consulting, project management, and project planning. Control, predictability, and compliance across all phases of your construction project. Expert project controls and planning.
metadata.keywords: project management, project planning, Planesco, PLANESCO, industrial construction consulting, construction project management, project controls, planning and scheduling, industrial projects, construction consulting, project delivery, safety by design, construction execution

hero.headline:
Control, predictability, and
compliance across all phases
of a construction project.

services.title: Services
services.projectManagementDesc: We translate the client’s objectives into structured execution, ensuring clarity, accountability, and continuity throughout the project.
services.planningControlsDesc: We transform project data into clear, reliable insights that support timely decision-making and proactive project control.
services.safetyByDesignDesc: We integrate safety principles into project engineering and design, prioritizing user protection by identifying potential hazards early and eliminating or minimizing them at the source.
services.aiToolsDesc: We apply artificial intelligence to enhance project visibility, accelerate risk identification, and support timely, informed decision-making.
services.clickToFlip: Click a card to flip and read more.

howWeWork.title: How We Work
howWeWork.subtitle: Our approach to industrial project delivery
howWeWork.step1Desc: We assess the project context, objectives, constraints, and risks to establish a clear and shared understanding of the work ahead.
howWeWork.step2Desc: We define the project structure, execution strategy, and control framework required to support predictable delivery.
howWeWork.step3Desc: We support and oversee project execution, ensuring alignment with the defined plan, technical requirements, and client objectives.
howWeWork.step4Desc: We continuously monitor project performance, identifying deviations early and enabling timely, informed decisions.

ourApproach.title: Our Approach:
ourApproach.paragraph1: PLANESCO provides structured support to its clients across all phases of a construction project, from early engineering and design through construction execution and commissioning.
ourApproach.paragraph2: Our approach is grounded in clear governance, reliable planning, and disciplined control, ensuring that schedules, costs, and deliverables remain aligned throughout the project lifecycle.
ourApproach.paragraph3: By integrating artificial intelligence into our tools, we shorten reaction times and enable timely corrective actions for early-identified project deviations, supporting consistent project performance.
ourApproach.paragraph4: Safety is a core priority at PLANESCO. Our Safety by Design approach embeds safety principles into engineering and design, with these outcomes carried through into execution planning.
ourApproach.paragraph5: This  allows us not only to provide safer working conditions, but also to measure performance and track continuous improvement areas.
ourApproach.testimonial1Quote: With PLANESCO, we achieved greater predictability and a safer working environment by integrating risk management, performance control, and safety into a coherent and practical system that strengthened overall project governance.
ourApproach.testimonial2Quote:
For Groupe LNA, PLANESCO proved to be much more than a subcontractor — they became a key partner in our Quick Project Recovery Task Force approach.

PLANESCO intervention helped restore project structure, enable faster decision-making, and bring greater transparency for investors.
ourApproach.testimonial3Quote:
When PLANESCO joined the UC project, we were facing significant control issues and schedule overruns. Carlos brought clarity by aligning our priorities with realistic objectives and rebuilding our project control framework.

His leadership was instrumental in restoring confidence, improving predictability, and strengthening our safety governance.
ourApproach.testimonial3Role: Senior Project Manager, POSCO Future M

footer.line2: Structured execution. Controlled delivery. Regulatory confidence.
